name: XTRA-GOLD RESOURCES CORP
business: We are engaged in the exploration of gold properties exclusively in the Republic of Ghana (Ghana), West Africa. Our interests in our projects are held by our Ghanaian subsidiary through mining leases. Currently, all five projects are in the exploration stage.

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the exploration of gold properties exclusively in the Republic of Ghana (Ghana), West Africa.

catalysts.event: Commence 30,000 m diamond drill program at Kibi Project
catalysts.sentence: As at the date of this Report, we: (i) plan to commence a further 30,000 m diamond drill program (the 2012 Drill Program);

catalysts.event: Prepare initial NI 43-101 compliant mineral resource estimate on Big Bend and East Dyke gold zones
catalysts.sentence: As at the date of this Report, we: ... (ii) have commissioned SEMS Exploration Services Ltd. (SEMS) to prepare an initial National Instrument 43-101 (NI 43-101) compliant mineral resource estimate on the Big Bend and East Dyke gold zones located within Zone 2 of this Project which will constitute the first ever mineral resource estimate generated on a gold project within the underexplored Kibi Gold Belt.
